---
title: "Customer Service"
description: "Customer service experience and strengths."
---

## Customer Service

Arturo brings hands-on experience helping customers identify their needs, compare options, and move forward with confidence. His customer-service approach is grounded in active listening, clear communication, and practical problem solving.

## Strengths

- Assessing customer goals and constraints
- Resolving complex customer concerns
- Communicating clearly in English and Spanish
- Building trust through product knowledge and follow-through
